steps.observed: Page loaded with title '证据库 - 翡翠信号图谱'

steps.expected: Multi-column wall/waterfall layout, NOT a 3-panel analyst workbench
steps.observed: 4-column card grid layout displaying evidence items in a wall/waterfall pattern. No 3-panel split (no left sidebar list + center detail + right panel). Layout is a single curated wall with direction/type/freshness filter bar at top and cards below in a responsive grid.

steps.action: Scroll full page to verify layout consistency
steps.observed: Wall layout is consistent across the full page with 28 cards in a 4-column grid, maintaining the wall/waterfall aesthetic throughout scrolling.

assertions.title: Evidence cards show context and relevance

steps.action: Take accessibility snapshot of evidence cards
steps.expected: Cards show: why cited, which direction it supports, freshness, weight/importance
steps.observed: Each card shows: (1) title, (2) weight badge (高权重/中权重/低权重), (3) type indicator (笔记/图片/评论), (4) freshness indicator (最近7天/最近3天/最近14天/最近30天/最近21天), (5) '为什么重要:' section explaining why the evidence was cited, (6) arrow link to the supported direction (e.g., '→ 18K 金镶翡翠'), (7) source attribution (e.g., '小红书用户 @优雅姐姐')

steps.action: Verify card content structure across multiple cards
steps.expected: Consistent structure with context and relevance info
steps.observed: All 28 cards follow the same structure: title → weight/type/freshness badges → relevance explanation → direction link → source. Layout prioritizes curation and readability with card-based wall layout rather than analyst-style side-panel mechanics.

steps.action: Take annotated screenshot for card detail evidence
steps.observed: Screenshot captured showing card details with type icons, weight badges, freshness indicators, relevance explanations, and direction links visible.

assertions.title: Evidence wall displays 25–30 items with rich density

steps.action: Fetch data file to count evidence entries
steps.observed: Data file contains exactly 28 evidence entries (evidence_entries array), each with id, type, title, source, related_direction, freshness, relevance_explanation, weight, product_line, and timestamp fields.

steps.action: Count evidence cards visible on page via accessibility snapshot
steps.observed: 28 evidence card headings found in accessibility snapshot (refs e7 through e34), matching the 28 entries in the data file. All cards rendered in the wall layout.

steps.action: Take full-page screenshot to verify density
steps.expected: High-density wall with many items visible
steps.observed: Full-page screenshot shows 28 evidence cards in a 4-column grid layout. The page header states '精选 28 条高质量证据'. Cards are rich with title, badges, relevance explanation, direction link, and source — creating high-density proof rather than a sparse sample.

steps.action: Scroll down to verify all cards are accessible
steps.observed: Scrolling reveals additional rows of cards below the fold. All 28 items are immediately visible on the full wall without pagination or load-more — the entire set is scannable.

summary: Tested 3 assertions: all 3 passed. VAL-EVID-001: Evidence wall uses a 4-column card grid layout (not a 3-panel analyst workbench). VAL-EVID-004: Each evidence card shows title, weight badge, type indicator, freshness, relevance explanation, supported direction link, and source attribution. VAL-EVID-007: All 28 evidence items are rendered on the wall in a high-density layout, matching the data file count of 28 entries (within the 25-30 range).
